scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); fs.rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.rmSync('tsconfig.tsbuildinfo',{force:true});" && tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json && node -e "require('node:fs').writeFileSync('dist/cjs/package.json', JSON.stringify({type:'commonjs'}, null, 2))"
